Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2025-04-09 21:47:04

Privacy Policy for Plumbers911Chicago.com
Effective Date: April 5, 2025

Welcome to Plumbers911Chicago.com. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal information is handled in a safe and responsible manner. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, store, and protect the information you provide when using our website and related services.

1. Information We Collect

When you visit Plumbers911Chicago.com, we may collect the following types of information:

  • Personal Information: This includes any information that can identify you personally, such as your name, address, email address, and phone number. We collect this information when you fill out a form, contact us, or otherwise provide it to us directly.
  • Transaction and Inquiry Information: Details of any requests, inquiries, or leads you submit through our website.
  • Usage Information: We may collect information about how you use our website, such as your browsing behavior, the pages you view, and your actions on the site.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information collected in the following ways:

  • To Process Inquiries and Provide Services: Your information helps us respond to your requests or connect you with the appropriate plumbing contractors for further assistance.
  • To Personalize Your Experience and Communicate with You: If you submit your contact information, you consent to receiving calls, text messages, or emails from Plumbers911Chicago.com or our affiliated contractors regarding inquiries or services.
  • To Improve Our Website: We continually strive to enhance our website offerings based on feedback and usage data.

3. Data Protection

We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information, including secure servers, data encryption where appropriate, and restricted access to personal data.

4. Sharing Your Information

  • Contractors in Our Program: We may share the personal information you provide (e.g., name, phone number, and details of your inquiry) with vetted plumbing contractors who are part of our program. This is done solely to help them follow up with you regarding your service request.
  • No Sale or Rental of Data: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to outside parties.
  • Aggregated Data: We may share generic aggregated demographic information not linked to any personal identification information with business partners and trusted affiliates for the purposes outlined above.

5. Your Consent

By using Plumbers911Chicago.com or submitting any personal information, you consent to the collection, use, and sharing of your information as described in this Privacy Policy.

6. Changes to Our Privacy Policy

If we decide to change our Privacy Policy, we will post those changes on this page and/or update the Effective Date at the top of this page.

7. Contacting Us

If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Support@Plumbers911Chicago.com

We are committed to ensuring that your experience with Plumbers911Chicago.com is secure, reliable, and satisfactory. Thank you for choosing Plumbers911Chicago.com.
